name: protostar-factory
description: Dark software factory control plane built from explicit intent, policy, execution, review, and Dogpile coordination cells.

scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @protostar/repair test && pnpm --filter @protostar/evaluation-runner test && pnpm --filter @protostar/intent test && pnpm --filter @protostar/delivery-runtime test && pnpm --filter @protostar/factory-cli test && pnpm knip --no-config-hints
scripts.factory: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @protostar/factory-cli start -- run --draft examples/intents/scaffold.draft.json --out .protostar/runs
scripts.release: pnpm changeset version && pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test && pnpm changeset publish
